'''Golkus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] between [[Carratos]] and [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell]] stopped there to get false identification papers from [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization before she first met [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on Coruscant.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
